environment.androidAvd: Pixel_8_2 API 34 arm64, Android 14, 1080x2400 @420dpi; headless boot succeeded

results.details: The packed tarball resolved from an isolated consumer root and bundled the full matrix fixture with plugins for both Metro platforms. Native Release installation was not exercised for this fixture.
Expo 56 / React Native 0.85 packed-consumer bundling passed from an isolated root under the release-proven ^0.81.0 || ^0.85.0 peer range.
Packed Expo 56 / React Native 0.85 applications built in Release, installed, launched, and visibly rendered the fixture on the designated iOS and Android simulators.

Real Shiki JavaScript-regex engine, RaTeX, beautiful-mermaid/react-native-svg, and react-native-webview adapters resolved and bundled on both Metro platforms. No runtime render or resource-budget claim is made.

blockers: Expo 54 native Release build/install/launch remains unverified; only isolated packed Metro bundling passed.
No reviewed iOS or Android visual baseline exists yet.
No physical Pixel 8 or iPhone 15 reference device is connected for release-Hermes frame, heap, or startup profiling.
Manual VoiceOver and TalkBack hardware verification has not been performed.
Maestro and Detox are not installed; iOS automated semantic hierarchy assertions are unavailable until one approved runner is installed.
The Android emulator streaming characterization exceeded the reference-device p95 budget and is recorded as non-reference evidence, not a pass.
Real Shiki, RaTeX, beautiful-mermaid, and WebView providers passed Metro bundling only; native Release rendering and resource gates remain unverified.
